title: vochysiaceae
intro: Vochysiaceae is a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of flowering plant families that belong to the order Myrtales. It comprises around 35 genera and approximately 600 species, primarily found in tropical regions of the Americas. The plants within this family are often characterized by their simple leaves and showy flowers, with some species having distinctive red or yellow colors. Vochysiaceae is one of the many families within the order Myrtales, and its members are commonly known as the triggerplants or irritable plants due to their unique defense mechanisms.
